config.chroma.shader_enabled.title: Enabled
config.chroma.shader_enabled.desc: Control whether any mod using Chroma has Post Shaders enabled.
config.chroma.effects_explosion.title: Advanced Explosions
config.chroma.effects_explosion.desc: Control whether explosions should use Chroma effects.
config.chroma.effects_firework.title: Advanced Fireworks
config.chroma.effects_firework.desc: Control whether fireworks should use Chroma effects.
config.chroma.effects_max_particles.desc: Control how many Chroma Particles can be on screen.
config.chroma.effects_max_distance.title: Max Distance
config.chroma.effects_max_distance.desc: Control how far Chroma Particles should render.
config.chroma.screenshake_enabled.title: Enabled
config.chroma.screenshake_enabled.desc: Control whether any mod using Chroma has Screenshake enabled.
